title: Fix heartbeat ideation false positive, reply in thread

log.context: Fix heartbeat ideation false positive, reply in thread

Done. Here's a summary of what was done:

**Problem**: `heartbeat_ideation.py` was counting clean SIGTERM restarts (from deploys/maintenance) as flapping, firing false-positive Congress sessions. The existing `DEPLOY_SERVICES` exclusion set was incomplete — `commons-server` and `claude-bot` were missing, and any new `labs-*` service would trigger the same problem.

**Fix in `/mnt/data/scripts/heartbeat_ideation.py`**:
